assertions.evidence: Dedicated exhaustiveness suite passed including exhaustive, wildcard, binding catchall, tuple, struct, nested, and regression-positive cases.
Dedicated exhaustiveness suite passed negative cases and CLI rejected a non-exhaustive enum match with an exhaustiveness diagnostic while leaving no output artifact.

frictions: Current CLI cannot produce Go for enum programs yet; exhaustive enum fixture fails later in codegen with "unsupported top-level item", so positive exhaustiveness was validated through the dedicated semantic exhaustiveness suite rather than a successful end-to-end codegen run.
